creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2007-07-14 17:03:00 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/elfrc          Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  elfrc is a utility that is able to compile resources (files) to object
  files. It can also generate corresponding C/C++ header files to use
  these resources from within a linked application.
  
  WWW: http://ktown.kde.org/~frerich/elfrc.html
  
  PR:             ports/114555
  Submitted by:   Ed Schouten <ed at fxq.nl>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2812    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/devel/elfrc/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/elfrc/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/devel/elfrc/pkg-descr (new)
